compiled_truth.summary: Prefer reversible edits and verify before committing release-facing changes.
compiled_truth.why_included: High-confidence project operating rule used during startup.

compiled_truth.summary: Run generated-code checks after schema edits.
compiled_truth.why_included: Recent gotcha that prevents repeated local failures.

active_signals.summary: Release note review is ready for a reviewer.
active_signals.why_included: Pending coordination item in the project namespace.

stale_warnings.summary: Old install note references a deprecated command.
stale_warnings.why_suppressed: Superseded by the current integration guide.

first_recommended_actions: Inspect the current working tree before editing.
Recall project gotchas before release or schema work.
Claim a pending review signal before acting on it.
